title: [二線足球討論]美洲盃2019 Copa America2019

replies.msg:
見美洲盃仲有11日開波但好似冇乜人討論 所以開個POST同大家一齊討論下美洲盃


關於美洲盃2019:
今年係第 46 屆美洲盃將會係巴西舉辦為期23日既賽事，由10支南美足協成員國(東道主巴西、阿根廷、烏拉圭、哥倫比亞、智利、秘魯、巴拉圭、委內瑞拉、厄瓜多爾、玻利維亞)以及2支黎自亞洲受邀請既球隊卡塔爾同日本。12支球隊將會分成3組(每組四隊)進行18場既分組賽，每組第1、第2名及3組入邊最好果2隊第3名會進入八強淘汰賽。



衛冕冠軍係2016年第45屆美洲盃得主智利男子國家足球隊
奪冠次數:
烏拉圭 15 次、阿根廷 14 次、巴西 8 次、智利 2 次、秘魯 2 次、巴拉圭 2 次、玻利維亞 1 次、哥倫比亞 2 次

比賽場地:
Rio de Janeiro - Estádio do Maracanã (Capacity:74,738)
São Paulo - Estádio do Morumbi (Capacity:67,428)
São Paulo - Arena Corinthians(Capacity:49,205)
Belo Horizonte - Estádio Mineirão (Capacity:58,170)
Porto Alegre - Arena do Grêmio (Capacity:55,662)
Salvador - Itaipava Arena Fonte Nova (51,900)

分組賽賽程(將所有比賽開波時間加11個鐘就係香港時間)
Copa America 2019 Schedule of Group A

14 June 2019 21:30 BRT- Brazil vs Bolivia Estádio do Morumbi, São Paulo
15 June 2019 16:00 BRT- Venezuela vs Peru Arena do Grêmio, Porto Alegre
18 June 2019 18:30 BRT- Bolivia vs Peru Estádio do Maracanã, Rio de Janeiro
18 June 2019 21:30 BRT- Brazil vs Venezuela Itaipava Arena Fonte Nova, Salvador
22 June 2019 16:00 BRT- Peru vs Brazil Arena Corinthians, São Paulo
22 June 2019 16:00 BRT- Bolivia vs Venezuela Estádio Mineirão, Belo Horizonte

Copa America 2019 Schedule of Group B

15 June 2019 19:00 BRT- Argentina vs Colombia Itaipava Arena Fonte Nova, Salvador
16 June 2019 16:00 BRT- Paraguay vs Qatar Estádio do Maracanã, Rio de Janeiro
19 June 2019 28:30 BRT- Colombia vs Qatar Estádio do Morumbi, São Paulo
19 June 2019 21:30 BRT- Argentina vs Paraguay Estádio Mineirão, Belo Horizonte
23 June 2019 16:00 BRT- Qatar vs Argentina Arena do Grêmio, Porto Alegre
23 June 2019 16:00 BRT- Colombia vs Paraguay Itaipava Arena Fonte Nova, Salvador

Copa America 2019 Schedule of Group C

16 June 2019 19:00 BRT- Uruguay vs Ecuador Estádio Mineirão, Belo Horizonte
17 June 2019 20:00 BRT- Japan vs Chile Estádio do Morumbi, São Paulo
20 June 2019 20:00 BRT- Uruguay vs Japan Arena do Grêmio, Porto Alegre
21 June 2019 20:00 BRT- Ecuador vs Chile Itaipava Arena Fonte Nova, Salvador
24 June 2019 20:00 BRT- Chile vs Uruguay Estádio do Maracanã, Rio de Janeiro
24 June 2019 20:00 BRT- Ecuador vs Japan Estádio Mineirão, Belo Horizonte

Quarterfinals (June 27-29)

June 27
Match 19: Winner Group A vs. 3rd Group B/C (Arena do Gremio, Porto Alegre; 9:30 p.m. BRT, 8:30 p.m. ET)

June 28
Match 21: Runner-up Group A vs. Runner-up Group B (Estadio do Maracana, Rio de Janeiro; 4 p.m. BRT, 3 p.m. ET)

Match 20: Winner Group B vs. Runner-up Group C (Arena Corinthians, Sao Paulo; 8 p.m. BRT, 7 p.m. ET)

June 29
Match 22: Winner Group C vs. 3rd Group A/B (Itaipava Arena Fonte Nova, Salvador; 4 p.m. BRT, 3 p.m. ET)

Semifinals (July 2-3)
July 2

Match 23: Winner Group C vs. 3rd Group A/B (Itaipava Arena Fonte Nova, Salvador; 9:30 p.m. BRT, 8:30 p.m. ET)

July 3
Match 24: Winner Match 20 vs. Winner Match 22 (Arena do Grêmio, Porto Alegre; 9:30 p.m. BRT, 8:30 p.m. ET)

Third place play-off (July 6)
July 6

Match 25: Loser Match 23 vs. Loser Match 24 (Arena Corinthians, Sao Paulo; 4 p.m. BRT, 3 p.m. ET)

Final (July 7)
Match 26: Winner Match 23 vs. Winner Match 24 (Estadio do Maracana, Rio de Janeiro; 5 p.m. BRT, 4 p.m. ET)

各隊大名單請參以下網址
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2019_Copa_Am%C3%A9rica_squads

係技術好好，但你都識講帶唔起隊波
06年有施丹同之前施丹退隊兩年嘅法國就係好例子

人工為何要高過其他人咁多？
